phenotype_to_guidance.Normal Metabolizer: Standard omeprazole dosing is appropriate for H. pylori eradication and GERD management.
phenotype_to_guidance.Intermediate Metabolizer: Standard dosing is generally effective. May have slightly increased drug exposure but no dose adjustment typically needed.
phenotype_to_guidance.Poor Metabolizer: Significantly increased omeprazole exposure. Reduced dose may be considered for long-term use. Higher efficacy for acid suppression expected.
phenotype_to_guidance.Rapid Metabolizer: Increased omeprazole metabolism, potentially reduced efficacy. Consider higher dose or alternative PPI for H. pylori eradication.
phenotype_to_guidance.Ultra-rapid Metabolizer: Substantially reduced omeprazole efficacy. CPIC recommends increasing dose by 100-200% for H. pylori eradication or considering an alternative PPI.
